finding: Poorly Marginated Radiolucent Lesion of Mandible

context: √  "floating teeth": suggestive of primary / secondary malignancy √  resorption of tooth root: hallmark of benign process √  thickened periodontal ligament space (earliest sign of the cystic form) √  contrast-enhancing rim around abscess √  focal / diffuse radiolucent / radiopaque lesion √  scattered sclerotic + lytic lesion √  enlarged trabecular spaces √  sequestered bone
